summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Honasa Task Force platform. All 26 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing verified login page, dashboard, agent detail, job detail with download button (P0 bug fix). Download button P0 BUG FIX VERIFIED - click triggers download correctly. Settings page route removed (returns blank). Queue status endpoint working with max 10 concurrent agents.

issues: One iframe-type agent ('Data Query Assistant') exists in DB but has no iframe_url - may show as broken agent if clicked. Consider filtering iframe agents or deleting this orphan agent.

action_items: Optional: Delete orphan iframe agent 'Data Query Assistant' from database or filter iframe-type agents from Dashboard display
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Download bug fix verified working - StreamingResponse with fetch+blob pattern is correct
Queue system properly implements MAX_CONCURRENT_AGENTS=10 limit
BigQuery chat agent code successfully removed from frontend
Settings page route removed from App.js router
test_credentials: Created test session via MongoDB direct insert for API testing
seed_data_creation: Created completed job 'job_test_download_*' with output file for download testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. P0 download bug fix verified. Backend uses cookie-based auth (session_token cookie). Test user creation can be done via MongoDB shell using auth_testing.md guide. Queue system at /api/queue/status returns proper metrics.

features_tested.login_flow: PASS - Google SSO button visible, login page loads correctly
features_tested.dashboard: PASS - Shows 7 agents, admin panel link visible for admin users
features_tested.settings_page_removed: PASS - Returns blank page (route removed from App.js)
features_tested.agent_detail: PASS - File upload and execute buttons present
features_tested.job_detail: PASS - Shows completed job with script output
features_tested.download_button_p0_fix: PASS - Click triggers download event, file downloads correctly
features_tested.queue_status_endpoint: PASS - Returns active_jobs, max_concurrent=10, queued_jobs, available_slots
